name: Monumental Energy Corp.
description: Monumental Energy Corp. is an exploration and development company focused on the critical and clean energy sector. The company has diversified its portfolio to include imminent oil and gas producing assets in New Zealand, alongside its mineral exploration projects in Chile. Its primary mineral activities target critical elements such as lithium and cesium within the prolific lithium triangle. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, Monumental Energy is committed to driving value through the acquisition and development of energy assets that support the global energy transition.
